nasb.text: When you have stayed for three days, you shall go down quickly and come to the place where you hid yourself on that eventful day, and you shall remain by the stone Ezel.

esv.text: On the third day go down quickly to the place where you hid yourself when the matter was in hand, and remain beside the stone heap.

cnv.text: 到後天，你要趕快下去，到你以前出事那天藏身的地方，在以色磐石旁邊等候。

ccb.text: 到了后天，你要赶快去上次出事时躲藏的以色磐石那里。
